data.description: Finding 2 from review of provision-ruleset.sh / ci-dso-staged.yml. The DSO_LLM_TIMEOUT_MINUTES env variable is documented but the llm-review job uses a hardcoded timeout-minutes: 10 rather than reading from the variable. This creates a documentation/implementation mismatch.
data.title: ci-dso-staged.yml: DSO_LLM_TIMEOUT_MINUTES variable documented but llm-review job uses hardcoded timeout-minutes: 10
